So I lead customer operations at GrowthX.
I've been here for about three months, which not that long, but we're also a year old.
So, you know, a mixed bag there, but I sort of my role is thinking about like the process and pieces that go into getting our clients deliverables, team organization.
All that stuff, tools, things like that.
And this role, our delivery org, which is what we call kind of like our client-facing teams, is structured in pods.
And this role is kind of the center of every pod.

So we, our pods are structured with account strategist or account director, kind of sitting at a high level, thinking about the long-term roadmap of what we're building for clients and how we're executing, kind of like building a strategy for our clients.
And then, and they manage two to three pods of teams that are led by MEs.
So account strategists, and then they have like two to three MEs underneath them that are managing three to five accounts.
So this role would manage three to five accounts, and we'll have a cop.
Sorry, content manager that works alongside them to generate kind of the day-to-day deliverables for the client.
So there are two pieces that are really important for the technical managing editor role.
The first is like the project management piece, which is just, okay, where are we against like our goal, against our deliverables?

How are we tracking and meeting our contractual obligations, updating the client on that, and working with the content manager who's actually like generating the first draft of every piece of content.
And then on the other side, there is a little bit, I mean, the technical piece is, that's where the technical piece comes in, which is growthx content is all generated.
Out of our own internal platform that leverages AI to write articles.
At a high level.

So the content managers are in that platform day to day, but it's the managing editor's job to make sure that those workflows are operating efficiently and help bring feedback back to the product team and make sure that, you know, we're hitting our mark through leveraging the platform.
Um, so that's kind of how we're thinking about the role and, and how this would, how you would fit in the larger delivery org.
you have any questions there?

review and I'm saying like, okay, this one, probably the best one out of them.

is a pharmaceutical company, very old school.

it's like top three biggest things that I can accomplish today.
